title: PostgreSQL Live Slowness Triage
description: Identify active queries, locks, and wait events causing current PostgreSQL slowness
author: A. Sharma

pg_active_summary.description: Active queries and wait events from pg_stat_activity

interactive_hints.pg_lock_contention: Run when queries show 'Lock' wait events or 'idle in transaction' states — maps the lock chain
interactive_hints.pg_slow_queries: Run to identify the specific queries consuming the most time across the cluster
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

pg_lock_contention.description: Lock contention and blocking query chains

interactive_hints.pg_slow_queries: Run alongside lock analysis if you suspect the blocking query is also a slow query
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far
Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far
